title: The Sermon of 'Uthman and the Slaying of al-Hurmuzan by 'Ubaydallah b. 'Umar
description: It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu'ayb-SayfBadr b. `Uthman-his paternal uncle: When the men of the shurd had rendered the oath of allegiance to 'Uthman, he went out more distressed than any of them. He came to the pulpit of the Messenger of God and preached to the people, praising and extolling God and asking His blessing upon the Prophet.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
